layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Strict grid hierarchy, dense and compact spacing. Objective, rigid, functional. Zero visual clutter.
layout_and_spacing.gap_strategy: gap-4 or gap-6 for tight correlation in data lists. gap-12 for distinct page sections.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain structural precision.
layout_and_spacing.shadows: Zero to minimal. Rely on 1px solid borders (border-gray-200) instead of shadows for separation.

component_strategies.dropdowns: Shadcn Select/DropdownMenu. border border-gray-200, shadow-none, rounded-sm. Highlight active items with bg-gray-100.
component_strategies.buttons: Flat, sharp edges (rounded-sm). Primary: bg-black text-white hover:bg-gray-800. Secondary: border border-gray-200 bg-white hover:bg-gray-50. Destructive: border border-red-500 text-red-600 bg-transparent hover:bg-red-50.
component_strategies.cards: Cardless layout preferred. Use bare grids with border-b separators, or flat containers with border border-gray-200 and no shadow.
component_strategies.inputs: Shadcn inputs. Flat, border-gray-300, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-black focus:border-black rounded-sm bg-white.
component_strategies.tables_lists: Strict row-based grid, border-b border-gray-200. Clear typographic hierarchy, right-aligned meta data.
component_strategies.navigation: Sticky top bar, solid white bg, border-b border-gray-200. No glassmorphism. Absolute structural clarity.

motion.entrance: Minimal movement. Pure opacity fades (duration-200) if necessary, otherwise load instantly.
motion.dropdowns: Instant pop or 100ms fade to feel extremely performant.

hero_login.description: Minimal workspace for authentication screen side panel (split screen design)

event_placeholder.description: Frosted glass architectural abstraction for default event covers to maintain premium feel

dashboard_empty_state.description: Elegant minimalist setup for empty dashboard states or unselected circles

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure 'Outfit' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts. Overwrite standard sans in Tailwind config.
The UI must represent Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Strip out all gradient backgrounds, blur effects, soft shadows, and rounded-xl/2xl corners from Shadcn defaults.
Build the multi-tenant navigation bar as a stark, highly functional top-bar with a 1px solid bottom border. The Role-view dropdown and Circle selector dropdown must sit prominently in this header.
For the 'Role-view dropdown', strictly segregate User, Admin, and Site Manager views. Ensure the active role dictates the sidebar/content context.
Implement the 'Circle selector dropdown' to dynamically swap out the active circle's events and details without a full page reload if possible.
Lists of events and members should be brutally simple: heavy font weights for titles/names, monospaced or highly readable small caps for metadata (dates/roles), separated by crisp 1px borders.

Ensure total adherence to accessibility: test text contrast ratios (use pure black on white). Add a 'data-testid' attribute to every actionable element (buttons, dropdown items, form inputs) to support robust E2E testing.
